title: Rechiseled: Applied Energistics 2
description: Allows autocrafting blocks from Rechiseled with AE2!
body:
![Chiseling pattern encoder demo](https://i.imgur.com/iky83w6.gif) **Rechiseled: Applied Energistics 2** adds integration between Applied Energistics 2 and Rechiseled! The mod allows for autocrafting of recipes from Rechiseled with the storage systems from Applied Energistics 2 as well as adding 100+ new decorative variants of blocks in Applied Energistics 2! ![Separator](https://imgur.com/0MeNaUZ.png) ### Decorative Blocks Blocks for Certus Quartz, Fluix Crystals, and Sky Stone all get new decorative variants the can be obtained with the Chisel.

![Separator](https://imgur.com/0MeNaUZ.png) ### Chiseling Patterns The Chiseling Pattern Encoder is a new block that allows you to pick an input and output entry from chiseling recipes and encode them into a Chiseling Pattern. The chiseling pattern can then be used with a Molecular Assembler to allow for autocrafting similar to regular crafting recipes. (As a bonus, the Chiseling Pattern Encoder also displays the selected entry on top of the block, making it great for decoration!)

![Separator](https://imgur.com/0MeNaUZ.png) ### Frequently Asked Questions **Can I use your mod in my modpack?** Yes, feel free to use my mod in your modpack ![Separator](https://imgur.com/0MeNaUZ.png) ### Discord For future content, upcoming mods, and discussion, feel free to join the SuperMartijn642 discord server! [](https://discord.gg/QEbGyUYB2e) ![Separator](https://imgur.com/0MeNaUZ.png)
